title:
GPS coordinates of all New Zealand postcodes
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## GPS coordinates of all New Zealand postcodes
Could you please supply a dataset of all New Zealand postcodes with gps coordinates for each.  Thank you

Postcode
Longitude
Latitude
Locality 
Territory
Region
Enable better care of our donor relationships with our charity.  We have about 17000 donors located across New Zealand.
Enabling more precision of out mail communications with our donors and with the churches that are a match in their regions.

### Response from New Zealand Post Limited
Comments This data is available for purchase and requires the completion of a licence agreement. Please contact datasolutions@nzpost.co.nz for more information.

#### Likely Source Agency
New Zealand Post Limited
